## ✅ Decisions locked — canonical in [DECISIONS.md](DECISIONS.md)
**[`DECISIONS.md`](DECISIONS.md) is the single source of truth.** Don't restate decisions elsewhere
— apply them and cite the `D#`. At a glance (auto-generated — run `decision_tools.py sync`):

<!-- DECISIONS:GLANCE start (generated by scripts/decision_tools.py sync) -->
**D1–D9 active (9).** D1 single source of truth · D2 contracts-first anti-rework · D3 scoped context feed · D4 scripted edits, propose-first · D5 design→build→test loop · D6 freeform-track waivers · D7 research-sourced coherence checks · D8 conformance over presence · D9 periodic realignment audit.
<!-- DECISIONS:GLANCE end -->

**This INDEX is the coherence dashboard.** Per the [routine](ROUTINE_add_decision.md), run
`decision_tools.py check` (coherence) + `coverage` (declared-target cites) whenever a decision
changes. Un-propagated decisions are the project's only open coherence debt.

## 🗺️ Reading paths

- *Ready to build:* INDEX → SPEC 00 → data/module specs → milestones.
- *Adding a decision:* [ROUTINE_add_decision.md](ROUTINE_add_decision.md).
